creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
The upgrade of the port rubygem-rake-0.9.2 is not compatible with rails.
If you want to have the new version in the port, please keep the old version 0.8.7 in the ports too.

Fix: 

Downgrade the port to version 0.8.7. Please see here this compability list:
http://www.redmine.org/projects/redmine/wiki/RedmineInstall
How-To-Repeat: Do a normal upgrade of the port with (portsnap fetch; portsnap update;
portmaster -a). This upgrade will break the application redmine.
